name: Cheery Cherry Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz) EAGLE BRAND sweetened condensed milk
1 package JOHNSTON'S graham cracker pie crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat the cream cheese until light and fluffy.
2. Add the sweetened condensed milk; blend thoroughly.
3. Stir in the lemon juice and vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
5. Chill for at least 3 hours or until well set.
6. Top with desired amount of cherry pie filling before serving.
7. Refrigerate leftovers.
